name: Qishen Zhou
title: Associate Professor · "Tang Aoqing" Young Scholar
org: School of Transportation, Jilin University | Department of Traffic Information Engineering and Control
intro: Dr. Qishen Zhou is an Associate Professor and "Tang Aoqing" Young Scholar in the School of Transportation, Jilin University. He received his Ph.D. degree in Transportation from Zhejiang University and earned his B.S. in Traffic Engineering from Huazhong University of Science and Technology. During his Ph.D. studies, he spent one year at ETH Zurich as a visiting scholar. His research group maintains close collaborations with Zhejiang University, City University of Hong Kong, and ETH Zurich.
interests: AI-empowered transportation, trustworthy traffic estimation and prediction, traffic control based on connected and autonomous vehicles

notice.title: Recruiting Graduate Students
notice.body: We welcome students with related research interests to apply to the M.S. program. Please send your CV and a statement of purpose to the email above.

news.title: Paper accepted
news.body: Paper "Metropolis-Scale Resilient and Trustworthy Traffic Flow Inference Using Multi-Source Data" accepted by the 10th International Symposium on Transport Network Resilience (INSTR 2026)! See you in Lyon 🎉

news.title: Paper accepted
news.body: Paper "ORThought: Benchmarking and Automating Logistics Optimization Modeling via Structured LLM Reasoning" accepted by Artificial Intelligence for Transportation 🎉

news.title: Joined School of Transportation, Jilin University
news.body: Started a new academic career at the School of Transportation, Jilin University as a "Tang Aoqing" Young Scholar (Associate Professor) 🎉

news.title: PhD defense
news.body: Completed PhD dissertation defense, with dissertation titled "Resilient Inference and Uncertainty Quantification for Global Traffic State Using Sparse Data" 🎉

news.title: Paper accepted
news.body: Paper "Network-Wide Freeway Traffic Estimation Using Sparse Sensor Data: A Dirichlet Graph Auto-Encoder Approach" accepted by IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems 🎉

news.title: Paper accepted
news.body: Paper "MoGERNN: An Inductive Traffic Predictor for Unobserved Locations" accepted by Transportation Research Part C: Emerging Technologies 🎉

news.title: Paper accepted
news.body: Paper "CASAformer: Congestion-aware Sparse Attention Transformer for Traffic Speed Prediction" accepted by Communications in Transportation Research 🎉

news.title: Completed Visiting Scholar at ETH Zurich
news.body: Completed the visiting scholar program at ETH Zurich and returned.

news.title: Started Visiting Scholar at ETH Zurich
news.body: Started the visiting scholar program at ETH Zurich.
